purpose: Design-time expectations for CVBrain Job Intelligence v1. These are not full JSON snapshots and should be enforced only when the corresponding mapper/schema exists.

assertion_scopes.current_runtime_contract: Run against the current deterministic /api/job-intake/analyze endpoint.
assertion_scopes.future_schema_expectation: Validate fixture intent and use as future mapper/AI acceptance criteria; do not fail current runtime solely for missing v1-only fields.

required_future_guarantees: explicit source locations preserved on mismatch
preferred/nice-to-have never silently promoted to hard filters
candidate results absent from extraction schema
